headline: Another crypto firm cuts staff in major AI push

headline: PayPal's Total Payment Volume: What's Fueling Double-Digit Growth?
summary: PYPL's TPV climbs 11% to $464B in Q1 2026 as Venmo, PSP momentum, debit cards and branded experiences help drive broad-based payment growth.

headline: Nu Holdings' Rising ARPAC Shows Monetization Strength is Deepening
summary: NU's rising ARPAC signals stronger monetization as the company generates more revenue from each active customer over time.
